book.author: André Wagner
book.title: Syntax for EBK
book.p:
Normal paragraph text is written in paragraphs. Single new lines have no effect on the text. A new line without a paragraph can
be forced.
Lists can be made like this:
And a ordered list looks like this:
Text can be bold, italics, underlined or a combination.
A separator can be made like this:
A external link can be represented with Google. A internal link can be made like this.
A image can be used like this.
